task_completion.description: Create a new sketch on the XY plane in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace interface is open with a new sketch active, and the property browser or view indicates the sketch is on the XY plane.
A U-shaped closed profile consisting of lines is visible in the sketch view.

task_completion.description: Apply the five specific dimensional constraints to the U-channel sketch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension labels are visible on the sketch matching the required specifications: 180 (overall width), 120 (web height), 20 (flange width), 12 (wall thickness), and 140 (inner width).

task_completion.description: Extrude the sketch to create a 3D solid with the specified depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D sketch is shown extruded into a 3D solid U-channel beam, and the property browser shows an extrusion group with a depth of 800mm.

task_completion.description: Save the SolveSpace project as coupler_beam.slvs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog is visible with the filename 'coupler_beam.slvs' in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory, or the main SolveSpace window title bar displays 'coupler_beam.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Export the sketch as a DXF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog is visible saving 'coupler_beam.dxf', or a file manager/terminal window shows the 'coupler_beam.dxf' file successfully created in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the SolveSpace graphical interface, including toolbars, menus, and the property browser.

integrity.description: The agent manually constructed the sketch and constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the progressive drawing of lines and application of constraints, rather than a completed model instantly appearing from an imported file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass the modeling task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run a pre-written script that generates the .slvs or .dxf files directly without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The U-channel profile must have the following constraints visible in the sketch: 180mm overall width, 120mm web height, 20mm flange width, 12mm wall thickness, and 140mm inner width. The sketch must be extruded to a depth of 800mm. The final files must be named coupler_beam.slvs and coupler_beam.dxf and saved in /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/.
